context.projectOverview: agent-bober — autonomous SWE pipeline harness. Sprint 4 of the Cockpit Integration spec adds the worktree-aware execution path so the cockpit can launch N parallel runs on the same project without conflicts.

completedSprints.title: Multi-run RunManager with disk persistence and crash recovery
completedSprints.summary: RunManager keyed-map, runs persisted to .bober/runs/<runId>/state.json with atomic writes, crash recovery via load()

completedSprints.title: Event-stream MCP tool
completedSprints.summary: bober_subscribe_events with server-initiated notifications and bounded queues
